nodes.title: Create Worktree
nodes.description: POST /api/git/worktree with {branchName, path}. Creates new git worktree at specified path with new branch. Returns {branch, path, success: true}. Returns 400 if branch or path exists.

nodes.title: List Worktrees
nodes.description: GET /api/git/worktrees. Returns array of {path, branch, head}. Lists all git worktrees in current repo. Empty array if none exist.

nodes.title: Get Git Status
nodes.description: GET /api/git/status with {worktreePath}. Returns {branch, clean: boolean, staged: [], modified: [], untracked: []}. Shows working directory status. Returns 400 if not a git repo.

nodes.title: Push Changes
nodes.description: POST /api/git/push with {worktreePath, remote, branch}. Pushes local branch to remote. Returns {pushed: true, remote, branch}. Returns 409 if there are conflicts.

nodes.title: Fetch Remote
nodes.description: POST /api/git/fetch with {worktreePath, remote}. Fetches latest from remote. Returns {fetched: true, updatedBranches: []}. Updates remote tracking refs.

nodes.title: Create Branch
nodes.description: POST /api/git/branch with {name, baseBranch, worktreePath}. Creates new branch from baseBranch. Optionally creates worktree. Returns {name, created: true}.

nodes.title: Copy Worktree CD
nodes.description: When user presses 'c'. Copies 'cd /path/to/worktree' command to clipboard. Shows 'Copied!' toast. Used to navigate terminal to worktree.

nodes.title: Merge Main
nodes.description: POST /api/git/merge with {worktreePath, sourceBranch}. Merges main branch into current branch. Returns {merged: true, conflicts: []} or {conflict: true, conflictingFiles: []}.

nodes.title: Get Git Remote
nodes.description: GET /api/git/remote. Returns {name, url, provider}. Detects git remote URL and infers provider (GitLab, GitHub, Codeberg). Used for MR/PR creation.
